articles.title: Kerala Assembly polls: SDPI pulls out of Manjeswaram contest, easing vote-split concerns for UDF
articles.description: SDPI’s withdrawal of its candidate comes days after criticism that the party’s presence in the fray could divide votes and indirectly aid BJP

articles.title: Chennai, Ahmedabad among venues to host Border-Gavaskar Trophy 2027
articles.description: Chennai Ahmedabad among venues to host BorderGavaskar Trophy

articles.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Touted as cement hub, but for Ariyalur constituency voters the future appears grey
articles.description: Residents, who blame successive governments for failing to invest adequately and prioritise the district, feel that the constituency would have changed to a great extent if it had high-profile leaders

articles.title: Video: Professor proposes to student inside classroom, she slaps him with slipper
articles.description: Video Professor proposes to student inside classroom she slaps him with slipper

articles.title: Virat Kohli, Rohit Sharma to play 9 ODIs as BCCI releases schedule for 2026-27 home season
articles.description: Virat Kohli Rohit Sharma to play  ODIs as BCCI releases schedule for  home season

articles.title: A Kodandarama temple that may have inspired Muthuswami Dikshitar’s raganga composition
articles.description: Located in Vaduvur on the banks of river Vennar, the temple with its tranquil setting and layered history is said to have a link to the composer’s Kokilaravam kriti.

topStories.title: How will the UK respond to US court verdict on social media?
topStories.description: Will the decision of a Los Angeles jury have an impact on the UK government as it considers potential future regulations on social media, writes the BBC's political editor.

topStories.title: Venezuela’s Maduro set to appear in US court months after abduction
topStories.description: The Venezuelan leader, who is accused of plotting to traffic cocaine, denies all charges as part of an imperialist plot.

topStories.title: Helium hitch: Why US-Israel war on Iran could cause MRI scan delays
topStories.description: Shortage of helium will have ripple effects across medical and other industries.

topStories.title: US seeks Hamas ‘political surrender’ in new Gaza plan
topStories.description: Analysts say a new US disarmament proposal exploits the regional war to enforce inequitable plan for Gaza.

topStories.title: Melania Trump unveils ‘Figure 3’ to 45 nations at White House- Who did humanoid greet in 11 languages, including Bangla
topStories.description: The robot, named Figure 3 welcomed the gathering with a wave and ‘welcome’ in 11 different languages. ‘Swagatam,’ the robot said in what was described as 'Bengali' by a White House pool report.

topStories.title: Trump's Iran Ceasefire Push Risks Israel Split. Why?
topStories.description: Israel fears a premature  ceasefire announced by Trump could derail its goal to dismantle Iran's nuclear missile programmes, prompting Netanyahu to order a 48-hr strike surge.

topStories.title: Two teenagers killed in Shiraz, two dead in Abu Dhabi as Iran war expands
topStories.description: Deadly attacks rise as Israel announces strikes on Isfahan and as Trump and Tehran debate ceasefire terms.

topStories.title: Trump confirms May meeting with Xi Jinping as Iran war forces postponement
topStories.description: Trump's delayed meeting with Xi Jinping will be the first visit to China by a US president since 2017.

topStories.title: 'I Said, No Thanks': Trump Claims Iran Wanted To Make Him Supreme Leader
topStories.description: Trump also insisted that Tehran was negotiating with Washington to end the war, despite Tehran's denial.

topStories.title: US Insists Talks Ongoing Even As Iran Rejects Trump Outreach
topStories.description: Hopeful remarks by the US president and White House Press Secretary run counter to Iran's earlier claims of publicly rejecting Trump's push for talks.

topStories.title: Transgender persons Amendment Bill opposed by community collectives
topStories.description: The Bill, passed by the Lok Sabha through a voice vote and now pending consideration in the Rajya Sabha, removes the provision for self-identification of gender, a principle recognised by the Supreme Court in the 2014 NALSA judgment and the 2014 Puttaswamy privacy ruling

dailyNews.description: Those who could leave New York in the last five years did. The deluge began under Andrew Cuomo and it continues apace under Kathy Hochul

dailyNews.description: With $39 trillion in national debt, politicians are selling myths about growth and tax hikes — but the real risk is to your savings and purchasing power.

dailyNews.description: Israel is fighting on two fronts in the Iran conflict, but Hugh Hewitt argues Americans remain largely unaware of their ally's contributions to the war.

dailyNews.title: Missing woman’s sister says Nancy Guthrie case now a ‘hope roller coaster’ for family as search continues
dailyNews.description: Julie Murray, whose sister Maura Murray vanished in 2004, warns that urgency fades in missing cases as Nancy Guthrie remains missing after 50 days.

dailyNews.title: Illegal immigrant accused of groping girls at Virginia high school facing new charges
dailyNews.description: An illegal immigrant accused of groping female students at Fairfax High School in Virginia was served with four more counts after additional victims came forward.

dailyNews.title: New Jersey Gov Sherrill signs law barring ICE agents from wearing face coverings to shield identities
dailyNews.description: New Jersey Gov. Mikie Sherrill signed a law that limits face coverings for ICE agents and requires them to present identification before detaining someone.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Threats to Europe Put Its Leaders in a Double Bind Over Iran
dailyNews.description: European politicians risk angering their voters if they join America’s war. Yet they could also face domestic upheaval if they take no action to reopen shipping routes that Iran has blocked and ease an energy crisis.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Appears With a Robot, Saying More Children Should Be Educated by Them
dailyNews.description: The first lady, Melania Trump, believes that more children should be educated by “humanoid educators.”

dailyNews.title: Trump to Delay Nominating New C.D.C. Director
dailyNews.description: The administration has yet to find a candidate who aligns with Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s agenda while avoiding his unpopular stance on vaccines.

dailyNews.title: Kate Marvel, Prominent Climate Scientist, Resigns From NASA
dailyNews.description: Kate Marvel, a well-known author, joins an estimated 95,000 people who have left federal science agencies since President Trump returned to the White House.

dailyNews.title: Justice Dept. Settles Flynn’s Wrongful Prosecution Suit for $1.25 Million
dailyNews.description: The agreement was an extraordinary example of how the Trump administration has offered legal relief to those aligned with the president.

dailyNews.title: How U.S.A.I.D. Birth Control Meant for Africa Was Ruined
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration had options for offloading contraceptives once destined for Africa, a newly obtained memo shows. Instead, it has let them collect dust and go bad.

dailyNews.title: Men of the Trump Administration, 2026
dailyNews.description: Are Democrats ugly? Asking for a friend.

dailyNews.title: White House turns down Elon Musk's offer to pay TSA workers during DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: In a post on X Saturday, Musk offered to pay the salaries of TSA workers during the DHS shutdown.

dailyNews.title: White House says Trump will "unleash hell" if Iran doesn't make deal
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt says talks with Tehran are ongoing hours after Iran's state media said the regime rejected Trump administration proposals.

dailyNews.title: Trump official refers New York AG Letitia James for prosecution again
dailyNews.description: A Trump administration official has made new criminal referrals against New York Attorney General Letitia James to federal prosecutors in Miami and Chicago for two cases of possible homeowner's insurance fraud, sources told CBS News.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he doesn't call Iran conflict a "war" due to need for approval from Congress
dailyNews.description: President Trump suggested late Wednesday he's avoiding describing the military conflict with Iran as a "war" because of concerns around the fact that Congress hasn't authorized military force.

dailyNews.title: Former Iran detainees fear Americans held in Iranian prisons face heightened danger
dailyNews.description: Emad Shargi, who was released from Iran's Evin prison in 2023, said "it's important" that President Trump "hears that there are innocent Americans being held like we were as political pawns."
